positive: A whimsical and intricate illustration of bioluminescent flora and celestial elements. Visualize intertwining patterns of stylized crescent moons, nebula clouds, stylized constellations, and fantastical glowing flowers (like lotuses and night-blooming cereus). The composition must be centrally focused and highly detailed, designed for a seamless, high-contrast print repeat. Use a deep indigo and sapphire color palette contrasted sharply with glowing gold, pearl white, and vibrant teal accents. Style: Art Nouveau mixed with Zentangle precision, utilizing thick, clean linework and smooth gradients. Composition: Symmetric, mandala-like structure. Lighting: Ethereal glow, dramatic rim lighting.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, trademark, celebrity, copyright, artifacts, grainy, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, oversaturated, simple, solid colors
